title: cephalanthera alba
intro: Cephalanthera alba, also known as the white helleborine, is a perennial orchid species native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The white helleborine is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Cephalanthera alba is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which are said to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
